title: User Registration with Valid Email and Password
description: Verify that a new user can successfully register with a valid email and password and receives email verification.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Enter a valid email address
Enter a valid password meeting all requirements
Submit registration form
User account is created in Firebase Authentication
Email verification message is sent to the registered email
User is redirected or shown message to verify email

title: User Registration with Invalid Email Format
description: Verify registration fails with an invalid email format.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'user@invalid')
Enter a valid password
Submit registration form
Form shows appropriate email format validation error
No account is created

title: User Login Success with Verified Email
description: Verify that registered users with verified email can log in successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter registered and verified email
Enter correct password
Submit login form
User is authenticated and redirected to homepage or dashboard
User session is properly established

title: User Login with Unverified Email
description: Verify that users with unverified email cannot log in and see appropriate message.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter registered email that has not been verified
Enter correct password
Submit login form
User is denied access
Message is shown asking to verify email before login

title: User Login Failure with Incorrect Password
description: Verify that login fails with incorrect password and error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter registered and verified email
Enter incorrect password
Submit login form
Login fails
Error message about invalid credentials is displayed

title: Browse Product Catalog with Filtering by Category
description: Verify that users can view products and filter them by categories dynamically loaded from Firestore.

steps.description: Log in as a user
Navigate to product catalog page
Product list loads dynamically from Firestore showing accurate stock and prices
Select a product category filter
Only products of selected category are displayed

title: Search Products with Keyword
description: Verify that users can search products by keywords and get relevant results in real time.

steps.description: Log in as a user
Navigate to product catalog page
Enter a search keyword in the search box
Product list is filtered to show relevant products matching the keyword
Empty state is shown if no products match

title: View Product Details and Options
description: Verify that user can view detailed information of a product and select product options if available.

steps.description: Navigate to product catalog
Select a product to view details
Product details page loads with product info including stock and price
Choose product options and input required game UID
Options are selectable and validated correctly

title: Add Product to Cart with Valid Data
description: Verify users can add a product with selected options and quantity to their cart.

steps.description: View product detail page for a valid product
Select options and enter valid game UID
Set quantity within available stock
Click add to cart
Product is added to cart and cart count is updated

title: Add Product to Cart with Invalid Quantity
description: Verify system prevents adding product to cart if quantity is zero, negative, or exceeds stock.

steps.description: View product detail page
Enter invalid quantity (0, negative, or more than stock)
Attempt to add product to cart
Add to cart action is blocked with appropriate error message

title: Apply Valid Coupon during Checkout
description: Verify that applying a valid coupon updates the order total with discount.

steps.description: Login and add items to cart
Proceed to checkout
Enter a valid coupon code
Apply coupon
Coupon is validated and discount is applied to order total

title: Apply Invalid or Expired Coupon during Checkout
description: Verify that using an invalid or expired coupon code results in an appropriate error and no discount applied.

steps.description: Login and add items to cart
Proceed to checkout
Enter invalid or expired coupon code
Apply coupon
Coupon is rejected and error message displayed
Order total remains unchanged

title: Complete Purchase Using Wallet Payment with Sufficient Balance
description: Verify that order using wallet payment with sufficient balance completes successfully and deducts correct amount.

steps.description: Login as user with sufficient wallet balance
Add product(s) to cart and proceed to checkout
Select wallet as payment method
Submit order
Order is created with status 'Pending' or 'Processing'
User wallet balance is reduced by order amount
Notification of successful order and wallet deduction is sent

title: Complete Purchase Using Wallet Payment with Insufficient Balance
description: Verify that order cannot be completed if wallet balance is insufficient and appropriate error is shown.

steps.description: Login as user with insufficient wallet balance
Add items to cart and proceed to checkout
Select wallet payment
Submit order
Order submission is blocked
Error message about insufficient wallet balance is shown

title: Make a Wallet Top-Up Request via bKash
description: Verify that user can successfully make a wallet top-up request using bKash with proper balance updates after manual confirmation.

steps.description: Login as user
Navigate to wallet top-up page
Select bKash as payment method
Enter a valid top-up amount and submit request
Top-up request is created and visible in user wallet history as pending
Admin approves the top-up request in admin panel
User wallet balance is updated with topped-up amount after approval
User receives notification about top-up approval

title: Transfer Wallet Balance to Another User with Fee Applied
description: Verify user can transfer wallet balance to another user and that fee is correctly calculated and deducted.

steps.description: Log in as user with sufficient balance
Navigate to balance transfer dialog
Enter recipient user ID and transfer amount
Confirm and submit transfer
Transfer is processed and fee is applied correctly
Sender balance decreased by amount plus fee
Recipient balance increased by transferred amount
Transfer transaction appears in both users’ transaction histories

title: Submit Reseller Application and Track Status
description: Verify user can submit reseller application and view status updates after admin approves or rejects the application.

steps.description: Login as regular user
Navigate to reseller application page
Complete and submit reseller application form with business details
Application data is stored and user can view application status as 'Pending'
Admin approves or rejects application in admin reseller management panel
User’s application status is updated to 'Approved' or 'Rejected'
User receives notification about application decision

title: Reseller Dashboard Wholesale Ordering
description: Verify that approved resellers can view wholesale products, place orders, and manage reseller wallet.

steps.description: Login as approved reseller
Navigate to reseller dashboard
Wholesale product catalog is displayed with special reseller pricing
Add wholesale product to cart and proceed to checkout
Complete the order
Order is created under reseller account
Reseller wallet balance is updated accordingly

title: Admin View and Manage Orders with Status Updates and Refund Processing
description: Verify admin can view all orders, update order statuses, and process refunds correctly with notifications triggered.

steps.description: Login as admin user
Navigate to admin order management page
All orders are listed with up-to-date status and details
Select an order and update its status (e.g. Processing, Completed, Cancelled)
Status change is saved and visible immediately
Process a refund request for an eligible order
Refund is processed, user wallet and order history updated accordingly
Notification sent to user about status update or refund

title: Admin Manage User Profile and Ban/Unban Functionality
description: Verify admin can view user profiles, edit details, ban or unban users and restrictions are enforced.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to admin user management page
User list loads with user details and ban status
Select a user and modify profile details
Ban the user
Ban status is updated in user record
Banned user is prevented from performing transactions or accessing protected features
Unban the user
User regains access to all allowed features

title: Notification System Sends Telegram and In-App Alerts Appropriately
description: Verify that system sends real-time Telegram and in-app toast notifications for orders, wallet activity, and admin messages.

steps.description: Trigger an order placement by a user
Admin receives Telegram notification about new order
Trigger wallet top-up request submission
Admin receives Telegram alert
Admin changes order status
User receives in-app toast notification about status update
Send a system-wide announcement
Users receive notice popup and in-app toast alerts

title: PWA Installation Prompt and Offline Support
description: Verify that the app prompts eligible mobile users for PWA installation and supports offline usage with cached data.

steps.description: Access site from supported mobile browser
PWA installation prompt is shown suitably
Accept installation prompt and install app
App installs and launches as standalone PWA
Access product catalog while offline
Cached data is displayed and app functions without errors

title: Ban Enforcement Overlay Blocks Actions for Banned Users
description: Verify banned users see an overlay preventing all transactions and access to protected features.

steps.description: Login as a user who has been banned by admin
Banned user overlay blocks interaction with sensitive UI areas
Attempt to place an order or top-up wallet
Actions are prevented and user is informed of ban status

title: Responsive UI Layout and Smooth Loading States
description: Verify that the UI renders responsively on desktop, tablet, and mobile with smooth animations and loading states.

steps.description: Access the website on desktop, then on tablet, then on mobile device or simulator
Layout adjusts and components render appropriately at each breakpoint
Navigate through pages requiring data loading (e.g., product catalog, orders)
Loading states and animated backgrounds are displayed smoothly during data fetch
